heading: Skennars Head vs Skinners Shoot — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Skennars Head, New South Wales and Skinners Shoot, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Skinners Shoot has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Skennars Head (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Skennars Head or Skinners Shoot safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Skennars Head has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Skinners Shoot scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Skennars Head scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Skinners Shoot scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Skennars Head or Skinners Shoot?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Skinners Shoot has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
